_comment: Copy to config.json and edit. Every key can also be overridden by env var; see .env.example.

mnemo._comment: If url is unreachable at startup, watcher runs in STANDALONE mode (payload travels in Discord notifications). Otherwise FULL mode (payload saved to Mnemo by tracking_id).

agents._comment: Agent name -> wake method. Methods: 'claude' (spawn claude --print), 'http' (POST to Agent Zero API), 'discord' (post to a Discord channel), 'queue' (pull-mode; watcher never marks read).
